name: Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spaghetti and set aside.
2. Melt butter in a pan and sauté onions until brown.
3. Mix flour with 1 glass of milk in a separate bowl.
4. Add the flour mixture to the pan with onions, then add another glass of milk and tomato sauce.
5. Cook until heated through, add salt, pepper, tuna, and sour cream (0.70 lb).
6. Place sauce at the bottom of a rectangular container.
7. Layer spaghetti, ham slices, cheese slices, more spaghetti, sauce, ham, and cheese on top.
8. Sprinkle with grated cheese.
9. Place small pieces of butter on top.
10. Bake in the oven until the cheese melts.
